title: Tender Australian Pappardelle Pasta
description: A comforting Australian dish featuring pappardelle pasta, this recipe is peppery and springy, wrapped in a ti-leaf vessel. It is a nut-free-friendly option for a delicious meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the pepper and salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
Wrap each portion of cooked pasta in a ti leaf, making sure to seal the edges.
Place the wrapped pasta in a baking dish and pour the chicken broth over the top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and top the pasta with shaved grana padano cheese.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
